generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our alliances. It's not about isolation—it's about resilience. When we diversify our supply chains and invest in domestic capabilities, we protect both our security and our values. The complexity of modern threats demands this approach. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
